title: App Settings - General - Account
scenario: Verify that tapping "Account" under "General" in App Settings expands to show "Your Account" section with "Log in" button and "You are not currently logged in" message, plus "Share Data" section with toggle and description, and tapping back returns to App Settings.
steps: 4. Verify that a "Your Account" section is displayed.
5. Verify that a "Log in" button is present and active.
6. Verify that the message "You are not currently logged in" is displayed.
7. Verify that a "Share Data" section is displayed.
8. Verify that the "Share Data" section contains a toggle.
9. Verify that the "Share Data" section contains a description about sharing basic device and app information.
11. Verify that the user is returned to the App Settings page.
expected: Tapping "Account" under "General" in App Settings expands to show a "Your Account" section with an active "Log in" button and a "You are not currently logged in" message, along with a "Share Data" section with a toggle and description about sharing basic device and app information. Tapping back returns the user to the App Settings page.
